properties.name: polyglot.core.fail-fast
properties.description: Eagerly validates discovered @PolyglotClient beans during startup and fails application startup if warmup, preload, or client binding fails.

properties.name: polyglot.core.log-metadata-on-startup
properties.description: Logs a single starter startup summary after warmup, preload, and fail-fast validation complete.

properties.name: polyglot.core.log-level
properties.description: Log level used for the startup summary. Supported values are TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, and ERROR.

properties.name: polyglot.python.safe-defaults
properties.description: Applies the starter's recommended GraalPy defaults. Disable this when you want a more minimal Python context and will provide your own PolyglotContextCustomizer beans.

properties.name: polyglot.python.preload-scripts
properties.description: Logical Python script names to evaluate during startup after warmup. Names are resolved through the configured ScriptSource. This is raw script evaluation only and does not populate interface caches or prebind Java contracts.

properties.name: polyglot.js.preload-scripts
properties.description: Logical JavaScript script names to evaluate during startup after warmup. Names are resolved through the configured ScriptSource. This is raw script evaluation only and does not populate interface caches or prebind Java contracts.

properties.name: polyglot.actuator.enabled
properties.description: Globally enables or disables the starter's actuator integrations.
